messages.content: how to say in a professional way, I always liked stuff to do with technology
I have always had a keen interest in the realm of technology.
how to say, I am a fast learner that grasps the things i was taught really well and I can also apply them when needed
I possess strong adaptability and a quick learning ability, enabling me to comprehend and promptly apply newly acquired skills or knowledge as required.
how to say, i am good at working in a team
I excel in collaborative settings and am adept at working seamlessly with colleagues towards a common goal, leveraging effective communication and cooperation skills.

Shortly after graduating I joined a game development company called Motion Miracles where I was responsible for delivering hypercasual games on a weekly basis as part of a team. I worked closely with Unity as our developing program and the programming language I used was C#.

Following my graduation, I embarked on my professional journey at Motion Miracles, a renowned game development company. In this role, I was entrusted with the responsibility of consistently delivering hypercasual games on a weekly basis, working collaboratively within a team. My primary development tool was Unity, and I leveraged my expertise in the C# programming language to actively contribute to the realization of these projects.
I have always had a keen interest in technology and even during my bachelors I had to work quite a bit with computers and other technological equipment, even using the programming language python.

Throughout my academic journey, I nurtured an inherent passion for technology. Even during my bachelor's program, I found myself extensively engaged with computers and various technological equipment. Additionally, I had the opportunity to work with programming languages like Python, further solidifying my proficiency in this domain.
Therefore the transition from my studies to my work was quite smooth and it really helped me enhance my programming and designing skills.
As a result, the transition from my studies to my professional career was remarkably seamless, greatly contributing to the enhancement of my programming and design proficiencies.
I love problem solving, it was key factor in both my degree and work environment and would always be rather a motivating thing for me to keep working

I derive great motivation from problem-solving, which has been a fundamental aspect of both my academic pursuits and professional endeavors. The ability to tackle challenges head-on and find effective solutions is a driving force that propels me to remain engaged and committed to my work.
I want to be able to use my skills and new skills i will learn with experience and apply them towards something that has so much more meaning like healthcare

I aspire to channel my existing skills and continuously acquire new ones through experience towards a more meaningful endeavor, such as the healthcare sector. It is my fervent desire to utilize my technical expertise in a field that positively impacts and improves the lives of others.
I hope you give my application a consideration and I hope to hear back from you.

Thank you for considering my application. I eagerly await a favorable response and the opportunity to further discuss how my skills and experiences align with the requirements of the position. I appreciate your time and consideration.
